backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Replace direct instantiation of UnitOfWork with a service-based factory method to support causal consistency tracking.
Replace direct UnitOfWork commit with a service-based commit method to ensure proper transaction handling in the new architecture.
Update service dependencies to use new package structures and add new services required for causal consistency and answer handling.
Replace direct ID-based data retrieval with causal consistency-aware remote methods that handle versioning and snapshots.
Update domain object constructors to accept DTOs or include version information for causal consistency.
Refactor quiz generation logic to explicitly set dates and use aggregate IDs instead of simple integers.
Implement methods to process various domain events (anonymize, remove, update) to maintain consistency across aggregates.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: public void processAnonymizeStudentEvent(Integer aggregateId, Event eventToProcess) { ... }

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Refactored createTournament endpoint to use a new path structure and changed topics parameter from Set to List.
Changed Tournament from implementing Aggregate interface to extending a new Aggregate base class to inherit common state and behavior.
Removed id, aggregateId, version, creationTs, and state fields from Tournament as they are now managed by the parent Aggregate class.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: removed private Integer id; private Integer aggregateId; private Integer version; private LocalDateTime creationTs; private AggregateState state;

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Updated constructors to call super(aggregateId, AggregateType.TOURNAMENT) and initialize final fields directly instead of using setters.
Implemented getEventSubscriptions to define inter-aggregate invariants by subscribing to events from related aggregates like CourseExecution and Quiz.
Changed verifyInvariants from returning a boolean to throwing an exception if invariants are broken, aligning with the new Aggregate contract.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: public void verifyInvariants() { if(!...) throw new TutorException(...); }

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Replaced the static merge method with an instance method mergeFields that delegates to specific field merge strategies, supporting the new Aggregate merge protocol.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Implemented specific merge logic for creator, courseExecution, quiz, cancelled, startTime, endTime, numberOfQuestions, participants, and topics.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: private void mergeCreator(Tournament committedTournament, Tournament mergedTournament) { ... }

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Added methods to declare which fields are changed by functionalities and their intention groups for conflict resolution.
Updated the primary constructor to accept and set the new version field.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: public TournamentCreator(Integer aggregateId, String name, String username, Integer version)

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Corrected a typo in the column name 'arggregate_id' to 'aggregate_id' and replaced the simple version lookup with a complex causal consistency query.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: Changed 'arggregate_id' to 'aggregate_id' and updated the query to filter by state and use a subquery for max version.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Refactored the concurrent versions query to return a single Optional entity based on the max ID instead of a Set.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: Changed 'findConcurrentVersions' to return Optional<Tournament> using a subquery for max(id).
